articles.title: U.S.-Iran talks postponed as Vance cancels trip and Israel intensifies strikes in southern Lebanon - NBC News
articles.description: The first peace talks between the United States and Iran were postponed Friday, as Vice President JD Vance canceled his planned travel to Switzerland and intense new Israeli strikes in Lebanon cast doubts on the deal to end the war.

articles.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 18 as Israel says four soldiers killed by Hezbollah - BBC
articles.description: It comes a day after the US and Iran signed a deal to end their conflict, including fighting in Lebanon.

articles.title: Oil prices are falling and stocks are up. Traders worry they’ve gone too far - CNN
articles.description: The agreement to re-open the Strait of Hormuz has been met with swift relief in markets. But some traders worry the rally in stocks and drop in oil prices might be overdone.

articles.title: Warsh wants markets to guide the Fed, not the other way around - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: New Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh said financial markets are "probably the most important source of information to guide central bankers." Here's how that could i...

articles.title: World Cup 2026 Power Rankings after one game: Who is No. 1? - ESPN
articles.description: All 48 teams have played one group game, so let's revisit our Power Rankings. What do our writers and experts think the field of favorites looks like after one week?

articles.title: Man arrested after boy injured in zoo crocodile enclosure - BBC
articles.description: A 30-year-old man has been arrested after a child ended up in a crocodile enclosure at a farm zoo.

articles.title: Asia markets fall as investors assess durability of U.S.-Iran peace deal - CNBC
articles.description: U.S. Vice President JD Vance on Thursday defended Trump's interim agreement with Iran, saying any economic relief for Tehran would depend on the country complying with the terms of the deal.

articles.title: Democrat Hannah Pingree and MAGA ally Bobby Charles will face off for Maine governor - Politico
articles.description: Both emerged from the state’s ranked choice voting process early Friday morning.

articles.title: Thousands of baby seals died on two remote sub-Antarctic islands. Scientists now think they know why - CNN
articles.description: A deadly strain of bird flu sweeping through remote islands near Antarctica has devastated the native wildlife population, killing an estimated 13,000 seal pups, as well as penguins and seabirds, researchers say.

articles.title: ‘Toy Story 5’ Heading To Franchise Record At Thursday Night Box Office - Deadline
articles.description: 'Toy Story 5' is headed to franchise record in previews with around $14M.

articles.title: Mexico beat South Korea 1-0, become first team to reach World Cup knockouts - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Luis Romo’s 50th-minute goal sent Mexico into the round of 32, which they will play on home soil, too.

articles.title: In bid to make a deal, billionaire tax backers offer to slash tax in exchange for Newsom’s support - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: They're asking Gov. Gavin Newsom to support a one-time 2% tax on the state’s wealthiest residents, less than half of the 5% tax that qualified for the ballot.

articles.title: U.S. Open: Wyndham Clark cashes in after Shinnecock’s bark proves worse than its bite - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Clark carries a four-shot lead with two holes still to play in Round 1.

articles.title: Blue paint on bottom of Reflecting Pool appears to be peeling away - WTOP
articles.description: There’s a new twist in the ongoing saga to clean up the Reflecting Pool. Some of the new “American Flag Blue” paint used to coat the bottom appears to be peeling away.

articles.title: "Pink Planet" is surrounded by salty clouds, researchers using Webb telescope find - CBS News
articles.description: The "Pink Planet," formally known as GJ504b, was discovered in 2013 and is technically not a planet but rather a "planetary-mass companion."

articles.title: EU delays trade confrontation with China - Financial Times
articles.description: Leaders opt for dialogue with Beijing rather than immediate action over fears of retaliation

articles.title: Bunnie Xo Reveals She and Jelly Roll Are ‘Still Having a Baby’ Amid Divorce - rollingstone.com
articles.description: Bunnie Xo is opening up following news of her divorce from Jelly Roll after 10 years of marriage.

articles.title: A bold satellite rescue mission came together in record time, but will it work? - Ars Technica
articles.description: I consider this a success already, just from the fact that we're even going to try this."
